title: lithocardium verbenaceum
intro: Lithocardium verbenaceum, also known as Verbena officinalis, is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of lithocardium verbenaceum include its use in treating insomnia, restlessness, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. Herbal preparations of lithocardium verbenaceum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
